ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-29-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF WILLIE SHEPARD'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) IS GRANTED.
